name: Chivo (SS-341)
events: This page was last updated in April 2017.
16 May 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) arrived at Newport, Rhode Island for torpedo trials.
21 May 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) returned to New London, Connecticut.
7 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) departed New London, Connecticut for Key West, Florida.
13 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) arrived at Key West, Florida from New London, Connecticut.
14 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
15 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
16 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
18 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
19 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
20 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
22 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
23 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) conducted exercises off Key West.
25 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) departed Key West, Florida for the Panama Canal Zone.
29 Jun 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from Key West, Florida.
17 Jul 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
30 Jul 1945 USS Chivo (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Crutcher, USNR) arrived at Pearl Harbor from the Panama Canal Zone.
